================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 C7 C6 C0 E0 C7
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x3D
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 21

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x3D
PayloadLen   : 21

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
9A C2 DF 69 00 00 00 00 BF 05 40 FB C2 F1 00 00 
00 00 00 00 01 

[RETURN VALUE]
9A C2 DF 69 00 00 00 00 BF 05 40 FB C2 F1 00 00 
00 00 00 00 01 

[BINARY DATA]
